title: DH5α bacteria transformation protocol
steps: Add 1 to 5 μl of DNA, and carefully flick the tube to mix cells and DNA
Place the mixture on ice for 10 minutes
Pipette 450 μl of room temperature SOC (or LB) into the mixture
Incubate at 37°C for 1 hour. Shake vigorously at 250 rpm.
Spread desired volume (150-350 μl) onto selection plate
Store at 4°C after incubation of needed
creator: Yoan Coudert
